leadText: Kowtow Cleave (Japanese: ドゲザン Kowtow Slash) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature move of Kingambit.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Kowtow Cleave inflicts damage and bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly . If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Kowtow Cleave is based on dogeza , which is kneeling to a person of higher status. The word " kowtow " more accurately refers to a Chinese act that is similar to dogeza.
